title: Incremental loads · watermark
subtitle: full vs incremental · watermark · idempotency · backfill · MERGE

levels.title: Full vs incremental
levels.instruction: Middle DE: «how do you refresh mart daily without full reload?»

flow.title: Read watermark
flow.desc: max(updated_at) from meta or state table

vizs.title: Three words
vizs.footnote: Read watermark → delta → load → commit watermark.

pairs.right: INSERT new + UPDATE existing by key
INSERT only; no idempotency → dupes on rerun

levels.title: SQL · extract delta
levels.instruction: Source: staging.events with updated_at. Watermark in pipeline variable.

mission.title: Nightly delta
mission.brief: Yesterday watermark = 2026-07-10 23:00:00. Pull only newer events.

sampleTable.caption: e1 ≤ watermark → skip. e2, e3 → in delta.

levels.template:
SELECT event_id, updated_at, payload
FROM staging.events
WHERE updated_at > ____

given.label: Given · full prompt
given.note: Use the table above as input; blanks complete the code/SQL below.
given.code:
# Context
Yesterday watermark = 2026-07-10 23:00:00. Pull only newer events.

event_id | updated_at | payload
--- | --- | ---
e1 | 2026-07-10 22:00 | old
e2 | 2026-07-11 01:00 | new
e3 | 2026-07-11 03:00 | new
# e1 ≤ watermark → skip. e2, e3 → in delta.

levels.title: State table · commit watermark

mission.title: Don't commit too early
mission.brief: Write watermark only when core.events and mart are aligned.

sampleTable.caption: Second row — after today's run (max updated_at in batch).

levels.template:
UPDATE meta.pipeline_watermarks
SET watermark_ts = ____,
    rows_loaded = ____
WHERE pipeline = 'events_to_core';

given.label: Given · full prompt
given.note: Use the table above as input; blanks complete the code/SQL below.
given.code:
# Context
Write watermark only when core.events and mart are aligned.

pipeline | watermark_ts | rows_loaded
--- | --- | ---
events_to_core | 2026-07-10 23:00:00 | 1200
events_to_core | 2026-07-11 03:00:00 | 85
# Second row — after today's run (max updated_at in batch).

levels.title: What's wrong with this load?
levels.instruction: DAG failed after load; morning rerun doubles orders in mart.

mission.title: Rerun without idempotency
mission.brief: Script appends to mart every time.

levels.buggyCode:
# incremental extract OK
new_rows = read_delta(watermark)

df = transform(new_rows)

df.to_sql(
    'mart_orders',
    con,
    if_exists='append',
    index=False
)
# watermark updated even if load failed
levels.prompt: Main cause of duplicates on rerun?
options: if_exists='append' without MERGE/upsert on order_id + watermark commit not transactional with load
watermark cannot live in meta table
levels.explainOk: Idempotent: MERGE ON key, or delete partition + insert, or staging swap. Watermark after success.
levels.explanation: On interview: «append + rerun = dupes; need upsert or partition replace».

levels.title: MERGE or append?
levels.instruction: core.orders already has order_id. Daily batch with status updates.

mission.title: Slowly changing facts
mission.brief: Same order_id may arrive with new status in delta.

levels.question: Safest idempotent incremental pattern?
options: MERGE / upsert on order_id: INSERT new, UPDATE changed
APPEND all — remove dupes in BI later
SELECT * without WHERE — full load every time
levels.explanation: Natural/business key + MERGE = DWH incremental classic.

levels.title: Backfill or incremental?
levels.scene: Transform bug Jul 1–5. Core has bad rows for those days. Prod mart in use.

choices.label: Full TRUNCATE prod mart and reload from 2020
Deliberate backfill: reprocess Jul 1–5 idempotent MERGE staging→core→mart + rowcount check
choices.feedback: Typical prod fix: narrow range + idempotency.

choices.label: Ignore — next incremental will fix it

levels.title: Safe incremental run
levels.instruction: Arrange nightly job steps (happy path + safe commit).

mission.title: Runbook
mission.brief: Don't update watermark if validate failed.
